data.title: Lamb Weston Holdings Announces Quarterly Dividend
data.description:
The Board of Directors of Lamb Weston Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: LW) has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.38 per share of Lamb Weston common stock. The dividend is payable on September 4, 2026, to stockholders of record as of the close of business on August 7, 2026.

About Lamb Weston
Lamb Weston is a leading supplier of frozen potato products to restaurants and retailers around the world. For more than 75 years, Lamb Weston has led the industry in innovation, introducing inventive products that simplify back-of-house management for its customers and make things more delicious for their customers. From the fields where Lamb Weston potatoes are grown to proactive customer partnerships, Lamb Weston always strives for more and never settles. Because, when we look at a potato, we see possibilities. Learn more about us at lambweston.com.

View source version on businesswire.com: https://www.businesswire.com/news/home/20260714973913/en/

STLTECH: Record revenue, EBITDA, and order book in Q1 FY27; net debt-free after INR 1,500 Cr QIP
data.description:
Record Q1 FY27 results with revenue up 87% YoY to INR 1,910 Cr and EBITDA up 184% YoY to INR 397 Cr. Net debt-free status achieved post INR 1,500 Cr QIP. Robust order book, major contract wins, and strong demand for AI-ready infrastructure support positive outlook.

Original document: Sterlite Technologies Limited [STLTECH] Interim report — Jul. 24 2026

data.description:

SAN: Record profit growth, efficiency gains, and strong capital position support 2026 targets
data.description:
Double-digit profit growth, improved efficiency, and strong capital generation marked H1 2026, with robust asset quality and liquidity ratios well above regulatory requirements. Strategic digital transformation and diversification continue to drive value, positioning the Group to meet its 2026 targets.

Original document: Banco Santander, S.A. [SAN] Slides Release — Jul. 24 2026

BANKINDIA: Net profit surged 36.23% YoY, with robust growth and improved asset quality
data.description:
Global business grew 16.57% YoY, with net profit up 36.23% and asset quality improving to a Gross NPA of 1.81%. Digital and ESG initiatives advanced, while capital adequacy strengthened to 18.69%.

Original document: Bank of India [BANKINDIA] Slides Release — Jul. 24 2026

data.title: HEG: Strong Q1 with 11% revenue growth, 29% EBITDA margin, and high capacity utilization above 90%
data.description:
Q1 FY 2027 saw strong profitability, with revenue up 11% YoY and EBITDA margin rising to 29%. Capacity utilization exceeded 90%, and the company remains debt-free with robust liquidity. Price hikes and input cost increases are expected to impact results from Q3 onwards.

data.title: Hewlett Packard Enterprise appoints David I. Goulden as director, joins Finance and HR Committees
data.description:
Hewlett Packard Enterprise appointed David I. Goulden as a director, effective July 24, 2026, and named him to the Finance and Investment Committee and the HR and Compensation Committee.

IndividualDavid I. Goulden
RoleDirector; Member, Finance and Investment Committee; Member, HR and Compensation Committee
Type of ChangeAppointed
Effective DateJuly 24, 2026
ReasonNot disclosed
Replacement InfoNot disclosed
Background DetailsFormer Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer at Booking Holdings Inc.; parent of Booking.com, Priceline, KAYAK.
Board/Committee Role ChangesAppointed to Finance and Investment Committee and HR and Compensation Committee

Original SEC Filing: Hewlett Packard Enterprise Co [ HPE ] - 8-K - Jul. 24, 2026
